name: Inverse-LLaVA: Rethinking Multimodal Alignment via Text-to-Vision Mapping

description: arXiv:2508.12466v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Traditional multimodal learning approaches rely on alignment pre-training to bridge vision and language modalities, typically by projecting visual features into discrete text token spaces using large-scale image--text data. We revisit this design choice and propose Inverse-LLaVA, a multimodal architecture that inverts the conventional ma...
author: Xuhui Zhan, Tyler Derr
